title: T-003 — changeover_matrix + changeover_matrix_versions tables
prompt:
# T-003 — changeover_matrix + changeover_matrix_versions tables

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.4, §6 D5 (per-line override)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `changeover_matrix` (allergen pair changeover lookup, per-line override supported per D5) + `changeover_matrix_versions` (versioned active flag) with RLS, unique constraints, and partial unique index for one active version per tenant.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0072_changeover_matrix.sql`: CREATE TABLE changeover_matrix_versions (per §9.4 DDL) + CREATE TABLE changeover_matrix (per §9.4 DDL) — line_id NULL = default tenant-wide, non-NULL = override.
2. UNIQUE (tenant_id, version_id, line_id, allergen_from, allergen_to) on changeover_matrix; partial UNIQUE INDEX idx_changeover_active_per_tenant ON changeover_matrix_versions(tenant_id) WHERE is_active=true.
3. RLS policies on both tables; idx_changeover_matrix_active.
4. Drizzle schema entries.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0072_changeover_matrix.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/changeover_matrix.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/changeover-matrix.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0072 applied, when \d changeover_matrix and \d changeover_matrix_versions run, then all §9.4 columns + RLS + partial unique index on is_active=true exist
2. Given two rows with is_active=true for same tenant, when second INSERT runs, then it fails the partial unique index
3. Given line_id NULL (default) and line_id='LINE-03' (override) for same allergen pair + version, when both INSERTed, then both succeed (UNIQUE permits NULL+specific)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/changeover-matrix.test.ts asserting partial unique on active version + per-line override permitted
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test changeover-matrix'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip the partial unique index (D5 constraint: only one active version per tenant)
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not implement seeding here (T-010)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create changeover_matrix + changeover_matrix_versions with RLS, per-line override support (D5), partial unique active version flag.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0072 emits both tables per §9.4 DDL. line_id NULL = default tenant-wide; non-NULL = override. Partial unique on is_active=true ensures only one active version per tenant. Drizzle schema mirrors columns. RED test verifies override semantics and active-version uniqueness.
out_of_scope: Do not seed allergen rows here (T-010)
